tasks.name: Find bugs
tasks.prompt: Review the code in src/ and write every bug or issue you find to bugs.md - one numbered item per bug, each with its file path and a short description. Do not fix anything yet.

tasks.name: Fix bugs
tasks.prompt: Read bugs.md and fix each listed issue one by one. After fixing an item, append ' - FIXED' to its line in bugs.md.

tasks.name: Verify fixes
tasks.prompt: Read bugs.md, review the current implementation against each item, and mark each line 'Verified fixed' or 'Still broken: <why>'.
